infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Proximity Chat needs your location to find nearby users.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Proximity Chat needs your location to find nearby users even in the background.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow Proximity Chat to access your camera for profile photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow Proximity Chat to access your photos for profile photos.
